a.xlink:title: Common base class for all memory intrinsics.
A wrapper class for inspecting calls to intrinsic functions.
This class represents a function call, abstracting a target machine's calling convention.
Base class for all callable instructions (InvokeInst and CallInst) Holds everything related to callin...
Mixin base class that is used to add getParent() and setParent(ParentTy*) methods to ilist_node_impl ...
An ilist node that can access its parent list.
This class represents any memset intrinsic.
This class represents any memcpy intrinsic i.e.
This class represents any memmove intrinsic i.e.
This is the common base class for memset/memcpy/memmove.
This class wraps the llvm.memset and llvm.memset.inline intrinsics.
This class wraps the llvm.experimental.memset.pattern intrinsic.
This class wraps the llvm.memcpy/memmove intrinsics.
This class wraps the llvm.memcpy intrinsic.
This class wraps the llvm.memmove intrinsic.
